title.raw: Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup (POS + Online Ordering + QR Table Ordering)
title.rendered: Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup (POS + Online Ordering + QR Table Ordering)

content.raw:
Newcastle Restaurant Square Setup (POS + Online Ordering + QR Table Ordering)

A fixed-scope, premium digital setup for Newcastle restaurants ready to own their orders and streamline front-of-house with Square.

We handle the entire Square ecosystem — POS configuration, online ordering, QR table ordering, and go-live — so you can focus on running your kitchen, not fighting technology.

Who This Is For

  • Newcastle restaurants opening a new venue or upgrading from pen-and-paper / an outdated POS
  • Cafes, pubs, and takeaway shops that want online ordering without 30% marketplace fees
  • Owners who want a done-for-you setup — not a DIY tutorial
  • Venues ready to invest $3,500 – $5,000 in a professional, standardised rollout

Not For You If:

  • You need Lightspeed, Vend, or another POS (we specialise in Square only)
  • You want general IT support or ongoing helpdesk
  • You need complex custom software development
  • Your budget is under $3,000

Newcastle Restaurant Digital Setup — Square Edition

Investment: from AUD $3,500 (typical range $3,500 – $5,000 depending on menu complexity)

What's Included

  • Square account setup and configuration
  • Full menu build — items, modifiers, categories, pricing
  • Tax and service charge configuration
  • Hardware and peripherals guidance (iPad, receipt printer, kitchen printer) — remote or on-site
  • Square Online Ordering — pickup and delivery rules, trading hours, order throttling
  • QR table ordering — table groups, QR code generation and print-ready assets
  • Domain connection (or instructions for purchasing and connecting)
  • Go-live testing checklist
  • Staff training session (1 x 60-min, on-site or remote)

What's Not Included

  • Other POS platforms (Lightspeed, Vend, Toast)
  • General IT support
  • Custom software development
  • Managing UberEats / DoorDash accounts (strategy guidance only)

Standard Process — 7 to 10 Days

DayWhat Happens
1–2Discovery call + menu mapping + Square base account setup
3Square Online ordering rules — pickup, delivery, hours, throttling
4QR table ordering setup + QR code assets delivered
5End-to-end testing + staff training session
6–10Adjustments, final tweaks, and go-live

What We Need From You

  • Full menu with items, modifiers, and prices
  • Logo and branding assets (if available)
  • Trading hours (dine-in, pickup, delivery)
  • Delivery zones and rules (if applicable)
  • Contact details — phone, email, address
  • Domain and DNS access (if connecting a custom domain)
  • Bank account details (for Square payouts)
  • Printer model info (if you already have hardware)

Optional: Monthly Support Plan

AUD $199 – $399 / month

  • Menu updates and seasonal changes
  • Square dashboard monitoring and reporting
  • Online ordering adjustments
  • Priority support via email or phone
  • Monthly performance summary

Ready to Set Up Square for Your Restaurant?

Book a 15-min Setup Call Get a Fixed-Scope Quote

Lead Form

Fill in the details below and we'll get back to you within 24 hours:

  • Restaurant name
  • Your name and role
  • Phone number
  • Email
  • Current POS (or none)
  • Do you need online ordering? (Yes / No / Not sure)
  • Preferred start date

No lock-in contracts. Fixed scope. Clear pricing.

Related Services

  • Google Business Profile Optimisation for Newcastle Restaurants
  • Facebook Page Setup for Newcastle Restaurants
  • QR Table Ordering for Newcastle Venues
